sections.paragraph:
not used in Kal; Chald., Syr., Arab. גְּרַד to scratch, to scrape, a root imitating the sound; compare חָרַט, חָרַם, חָרַשׁ, חָרַת χαράττω, خاريدن, غرشيدن; and in the western languages, grattare, gratter, to grate, to scratch, kraßen. Compare under גָּרַב.

Hithpael, to scrape oneself (with a potsherd), to allay itching. Job 2:8.
